subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali-Qabli-Muhammad! Ponder thou upon the grace of God, glorified be His splendor, in this first hour of the night, which is the eighth of the month [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل محمد در فضل حق جل جلاله تفکر نما در اول این لیل که لیل هشتم ماه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
